ab: Acin, malalup ku mada za tratruli, karuwa u pavelas kaninku?
ch: W:Acin，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Acin, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: iniyan nanku, ini mu tuni Imay.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Imay’s.

ab: nu kemazu mu karuwa pavelas kaninku? kadadika ku palawli’ kaninu.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: ai, alaku.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: lrayuan, lrayuan kuwayu lra i Imay.
en: Thank you and thank Imay for me.

ab: maranger u za eman?
en: May I help you?

ab: pareveliyas ku kananni na zuwa’etiv na valray.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: ai, maranger u ziya za eman?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: kiyavelas ku ziya za telu ’etiv a valray.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: maruwa lra. amanan na malalup pakalrang nu telu wariyan mu palawli’u lra.
ch: A:好了。記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: ’azi u ziya palawli’ za ku aivas.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: ku palawli’aw lra a adaman zi.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: kemazu zi malremes ku aivas awa?
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了？
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: nu pavelasanay kani Uratr maku?
en: Did you lend it to Uratr?

ab: aku mazalram kayku kiumalray.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: ku pavelasay u ziya kanaku aivas.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Imay, ini na kaytu tu ipavelas i Uratr kaninu?
en: Imay, did Uratr lend you this coat?

ab: melri, tu trinima’an ni nani veray kaninku.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: maresan tu kaytu ni Kacaw kaninu.
en: Kacaw’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: tu kaytu mu maw na ’uze’uzem, ’azi maresan tu pinivalrayan.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Imay, kivelas u kani Uyang za paisu?
en: Imay, did you borrow money from Uyang?

ab: ai, pavelaliyas ku kanintaw kema ku mu, malalup ku lra mada za paisu.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: nu kemazu mu nu aidan palawli’ u?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: ku palawli’aw nu ’emanan kantaw.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: ai, ku rengayanay lra kani Uyang nannu ikakuwa.
en: Okay, I will tell Uyang for you.
